companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan: central-media-contract

## Spec Outline
Create one canonical media metadata contract that can carry provider identity across frontend playback, backend persistence, and provider-search boundaries without breaking current local/TIDAL/YouTube behavior. Today, provider identity is fragmented across `streamSource`, `tidalTrackId`, `youtubeVideoId`, engine-only `sourceType` values, and boundary-specific payloads. The goal is to define a provider-agnostic envelope (`source`, provider ID(s), compatibility fields) and integrate it at the minimum critical boundaries: frontend track/runtime mapping, backend playback-state queue sanitization, Listen Together queue serialization, YT Music search typing, and segmented streaming source-type aliases. Runtime behavior remains unchanged for this phase: segmented sessions stay local-only, direct playback remains the path for remote providers, and legacy fields remain supported during migration. Deliverable is an enforceable contract slice that enables future connector plug-in work without ad-hoc shims.

## Refined Spec
Add canonical contract modules in frontend and backend with aligned source taxonomy (`local`, `tidal`, `youtube`) and explicit mapper helpers for legacy compatibility (`streamSource` + provider IDs). Frontend adoption will preserve current component/API behavior while moving source resolution and engine mapping to the canonical envelope. Backend adoption will preserve payload-size and safety constraints by extending queue sanitization/parsing with optional provider envelope fields, treating malformed provider values as absent. YT Music search will move from `any[]` to a typed canonical result shape while retaining route compatibility. Segmented contracts will align type aliases to canonical source taxonomy but continue strict local-only enforcement in validators/runtime gates. No DB schema change in this slice. No connector execution expansion in this slice. All behavior-changing boundaries require targeted regression tests before completion.

## Reuse/Consolidation Check
- Reuse existing boundaries: `audio-state-context`, `AudioPlaybackOrchestrator`, `playbackState`, `listenTogetherManager`, `youtubeMusic` service/routes.
- Reuse existing compatibility pattern: keep legacy fields while canonical fields become the source of truth.
- Consolidation complete: unified backend/frontend canonical contract into shared package `@soundspan/media-metadata-contract` (`packages/media-metadata-contract`).

## Detailed Implementation Plan
### Complete
- `CMC-00` Governance startup: required docs read, queue item created, explorer subagents delegated for scoped analysis.
- `CMC-01` Canonical contract modules
  - Added canonical contract files in backend/frontend with aligned source taxonomy (`local|tidal|youtube`), provider envelope, normalization helpers, and legacy mapping helpers.
- `CMC-02` Frontend playback/runtime adoption
  - Added canonical provider fields to frontend track/listen-together socket contracts and moved orchestrator source resolution to canonical helpers while preserving legacy stream fields.
- `CMC-03` Backend queue persistence adoption
  - Extended playback-state queue sanitization and Listen Together queue parsing/serialization to persist/recover canonical provider envelope + backward-compatible legacy fields.
- `CMC-04` Provider search contract normalization
  - Added canonical YT search mapper in backend service/route and typed frontend API search contract to canonical search results.
- `CMC-05` Segmented source alias alignment
  - Aligned segmented source type aliases to canonical local-only extract on backend/frontend types while preserving runtime local-only constraints.
- `CMC-06` Verification and closeout
  - Added/updated targeted regression tests and completed full backend/frontend build verification with passing results.
- `CMC-07` Shared package consolidation
  - Replaced duplicated frontend/backend canonical contract files with single shared package `@soundspan/media-metadata-contract`, updated imports/dependencies/lockfiles, and removed duplicate local copies.
- `CMC-08` Contract drift-prevention hardening
  - Migrated shared contract package to TypeScript single source (`src/index.ts`) with generated `dist/index.js` + `dist/index.d.ts`, and wired backend/frontend pre-build/test/lint hooks to regenerate the shared contract before app validation/build flows.

### Pending
- None for this phase slice.

## Delegation Plan
- Explorer outputs already complete for: frontend boundaries, backend queue contracts, provider search contracts, segmented type constraints.
- Implementation delegation will run as atomic worker subagent tasks `CMC-01` through `CMC-06` sequentially, with one active task at a time.

## Execution Gate
- Non-trivial implementation starts only after explicit user approval on this refined plan.

## Verification Evidence
- `npm test -- --runTestsByPath src/routes/__tests__/playbackStateRuntime.test.ts src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicRuntime.test.ts src/services/__tests__/youtubeMusicService.test.ts src/services/__tests__/listenTogetherManagerRuntime.test.ts src/routes/__tests__/streamingRuntime.test.ts` (backend, pass)
- `npm test -- --runTestsByPath src/services/__tests__/listenTogether.test.ts` (backend, pass)
- `node --test --experimental-test-module-mocks --import ../backend/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs tests/component/runtimeAudioEngineVolumeSync.component.test.ts` (frontend, pass)
- `node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/unit/audioPlaybackNormalization.test.ts tests/unit/playNowQueueLogic.test.ts tests/unit/playbackStateReconciliation.test.ts tests/unit/segmentedStartupPolicy.test.ts` (frontend, pass)
- `node --test --experimental-test-module-mocks --import ../backend/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs tests/component/queuePageOverflowMenu.component.test.ts` (frontend, pass)
- `npm run build` (backend, pass)
- `npm run build` (frontend, pass)
- `npm run lint -- components/player/AudioPlaybackOrchestrator.tsx lib/api.ts lib/audio-engine/types.ts lib/audio-state-context.tsx lib/listen-together-context.tsx lib/listen-together-socket.ts` (frontend, warnings-only; no errors)
- `npm run test:unit -- tests/unit/audioPlaybackNormalization.test.ts tests/unit/playNowQueueLogic.test.ts tests/unit/playbackStateReconciliation.test.ts tests/unit/segmentedStartupPolicy.test.ts` (frontend, pass; pretest hook regenerates shared contract)
- `npm run test:component -- tests/component/runtimeAudioEngineVolumeSync.component.test.ts tests/component/queuePageOverflowMenu.component.test.ts` (frontend, pass; pretest hook regenerates shared contract)
